_provenance.note: Descriptive sidecar for the CURRENT state. extensions.componentStyle / motifs / voice carry the v1 brand-extraction fields forward so nothing is lost.

display.purpose: Page H1s. Georgia 700 at 2.5rem; one per page.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: The system's only shadow; cards and pricing tiers.

do: GAAP-aligned statements exported to PDF and XLSX, with a change log on every line item.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Navy demo CTA; the only filled button in the system.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; background: #1f3a5f; color: #ffffff; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #14263f; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3d6b9e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Bordered feature/pricing card with the system's single ambient shadow.
components.html:
Automatic reconciliation

Match bank feeds to ledger entries every night.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #dde3e9; border-radius: 4px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(20,30,45,0.08); } .ds-card h3 { font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.5rem; line-height: 1.3; color: #2b2f36; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card p { font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #2b2f36; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: The captured system reads like well-kept paperwork: white pages, navy letterhead, serif headings, thin grey rules. Color is rationed — navy carries authority at hero, header CTA, and CTA band; everything between is white or pale mist. Rhythm is uniform: a 64px section cadence with no compositional surprises.
keyCharacteristics: Conservative two-hue palette (navy + muted blue) on white
Flat surfaces, hairline borders, one whisper-quiet card shadow
Identical page anatomy across all five captured pages

rules.name: The Letterhead Rule
rules.body: Navy fills exactly three surfaces per page — hero/page-head accents, the header CTA, and the pre-footer CTA band. It never appears mid-page.

dos: Do keep navy (#1f3a5f) as the only surface-filling color; it appears at hero, header CTA, and CTA band only.
Do hold the 64px section rhythm and white/mist alternation on every page.
Do keep serif display over sans body — it is the system's one deliberate pairing.
donts: Don't introduce gradients — the captured system has zero.
Don't use uppercase headings; only 4% of captured headings are uppercase (eyebrow labels).
Don't add motion; the captured site has no transitions beyond default link hover color.
